Class Cell

java.lang.Object
simulation.entities.Cell
All Implemented Interfaces:
FireBehaviour
public class Cell extends Object implements FireBehaviour
Represents a single cell of the simulation grid.

Each cell stores physical attributes (humidity, inflammability, resistance, vegetation density, temperature) that drive the fire-spread formulas, as well as its current CellState and TerrainType.

Implements FireBehaviour so the propagation algorithm can interact with cells through that interface alone.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cell(int x, int y)
    Creates a cell at position (x, y) with default forest attributes and a random initial temperature.

  • Constructor Details

    • Cell

      public Cell(int x, int y)
      Creates a cell at position (x, y) with default forest attributes and a random initial temperature.
      Parameters:
      x - column index in the grid
      y - row index in the grid

  • Method Details

    • canIgnite

      public boolean canIgnite()
      Returns true if this cell can currently catch fire. A cell can ignite only when it is
      invalid reference 
      CellState#INTACT
      and its terrain does not block fire.

      A cell can ignite if and only if it is CellState.INTACT and its terrain does not block fire propagation.

      Specified by:
      canIgnite in interface FireBehaviour
      Returns:
      true if ignition is possible

    • blocksfire

      public boolean blocksfire()
      Returns true if this cell type stops fire from propagating through it (water, firebreak, urban zone, wet zone).

      Water, firebreaks, wet zones and urban zones all block fire.

      Specified by:
      blocksfire in interface FireBehaviour
      Returns:
      true if the cell acts as a fire barrier

    • heat

      public void heat(double delta)
      Raises the cell temperature by delta degrees.
      Specified by:
      heat in interface FireBehaviour
      Parameters:
      delta - temperature increase in °C (should be ≥ 0)

    • adjustHumidity

      public void adjustHumidity(double delta)
      Adjusts the cell humidity by delta (positive = wetter, negative = drier). The result is clamped to [0.0, 1.0].

      Result is clamped to [0.0, 1.0].

      Specified by:
      adjustHumidity in interface FireBehaviour
      Parameters:
      delta - humidity change

    • decrementBurnCounter

      public void decrementBurnCounter()
      Decrements the burn counter by one. Call once per time step while the cell is CellState.ON_FIRE.

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns:
      column index
